description_long: This is a robust wristwatch with a metallic link bracelet and a round, glass-covered dial. The dial features multiple subdials, indicating a chronograph design, and is surrounded by a prominent bezel. The case and bracelet are made of polished metal, giving the watch a sleek and reflective appearance. Three pushers and a crown are visible on the right side of the case, used for adjusting time and chronograph functions. The bracelet consists of interlocking links, providing both flexibility and durability. The overall design is masculine and sporty, suitable for urban and professional settings.
description: A polished metal chronograph wristwatch with a round dial, multiple subdials, and a link bracelet.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round dial with chronograph subdials, bezel, and part of the metal bracelet.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the thickness of the case and the curved metal bracelet links.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the crown and pushers, as well as the solid metal bracelet.
description_view_3: Side profile from the left, showing the bracelet curvature and the case's smooth edge.
attribute_dial_design: Chronograph style with three subdials, baton hour markers, and a textured background. The dial is detailed and functional, with clear divisions for each subdial and a sporty, technical aesthetic.
attribute_strap_type: Metal link bracelet made of stainless steel, featuring interlocking segments for flexibility and durability.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three central hands and three subdials for chronograph functions. No digital elements are visible.
